title: hieracium trefferianum
intro: Hieracium trefferianum, also known as treffel hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Hieracium trefferianum is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various herbal preparations.
